steps.title: Convert projects app to TypeScript
steps.description: Fully type ProjectEditor, SubprojectEditor, and related components, fix UI bugs.

steps.title: Audit remaining apps for JavaScript files
steps.description: Identify .js files across contacts, framework, projects, tasks, etc. and plan conversion.

steps.title: Convert first additional app (e.g., contacts) to TypeScript
steps.description: Migrate components, update tests, ensure typechecks pass.

steps.title: Establish shared types and utils
steps.description: Expand @myorg/types and utils as needed for new conversions.
